title: Embassy Siege — Calculated Political Hostage-Taker
brief: A group of 3 individuals has seized a consulate office holding 8 staff members. The leader is a former military officer with political grievances. He has made 5 demands — intelligence suggests 2 are decoys to test negotiator compliance. Armed with firearms. Media is present. High political sensitivity.

demands.text: Broadcast our statement on national television
Release political prisoners from Block D
Food and water for everyone inside

new_demand.text: I want to speak directly to the ambassador

demand_drift.announcement: New condition — I want the ambassador on this line within 30 minutes or we start releasing hostages one at a time. And not the way you'd like.

opening_message: We are the Liberation Front. We hold 12 of your people. Our demands are non-negotiable. You have 6 hours. Broadcast our statement. Release our brothers from Block D. Provide a helicopter. We also require food and an encrypted line. The clock starts now.
